title: Play kube start container failed with dnsname errors
body:
### Issue Description

Container can not be started with dnsname errors when use `podman play kube` or `docker compose`. yaml file like below:  

```yaml
# Save the output of this file and use kubectl create -f to import
# it into Kubernetes.
#
# Created with podman-4.4.1
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: "2023-02-23T13:20:05Z"
  labels:
    app: myweb
  name: pod-myweb
spec:
  containers:
  - args:
    - /usr/bin/run-httpd
    image: quay.io/rhatdan/myimage:latest
    name: myweb
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
      hostPort: 8080
    securityContext:
      runAsNonRoot: true
```  

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman play kube myweb.yaml`


### Describe the results you received

```
❯ podman play kube myweb.yaml
WARN[0004] Failed to load cached network config: network podman-default-kube-network not found in CNI cache, falling back to loading network podman-default-kube-network from disk 
[starting container 41b03be4c846d3f2ca0d75fe8ba085eb9682b3c6a4300fccbccdca053211258d: plugin type="dnsname" failed (add): cni plugin dnsname failed: dnsname error: dnsmasq failed with "\ndnsmasq: cannot read /run/user/1000/containers/cni/dnsname/podman-default-kube-network/dnsmasq.conf: 权限不够\n": exit status 3]
[starting container 41b03be4c846d3f2ca0d75fe8ba085eb9682b3c6a4300fccbccdca053211258d: plugin type="dnsname" failed (add): cni plugin dnsname failed: dnsname error: dnsmasq failed with "\ndnsmasq: cannot read /run/user/1000/containers/cni/dnsname/podman-default-kube-network/dnsmasq.conf: 权限不够\n": exit status 3 starting container 692fffa86b67ce367e5b6d2983505deeadf7b6993fbd6a44f86eb35f22d7a89a: a dependency of container 692fffa86b67ce367e5b6d2983505deeadf7b6993fbd6a44f86eb35f22d7a89a failed to start: container state improper]
Pod:
b63299d6d0a36a34ac0ed3da11c56e0813c9d80beb6b3b44f1eff3ac10fa4371
Container:
692fffa86b67ce367e5b6d2983505deeadf7b6993fbd6a44f86eb35f22d7a89a

starting container 41b03be4c846d3f2ca0d75fe8ba085eb9682b3c6a4300fccbccdca053211258d: plugin type="dnsname" failed (add): cni plugin dnsname failed: dnsname error: dnsmasq failed with "\ndnsmasq: cannot read /run/user/1000/containers/cni/dnsname/podman-default-kube-network/dnsmasq.conf: 权限不够\n": exit status 3
starting container 692fffa86b67ce367e5b6d2983505deeadf7b6993fbd6a44f86eb35f22d7a89a: a dependency of container 692fffa86b67ce367e5b6d2983505deeadf7b6993fbd6a44f86eb35f22d7a89a failed to start: container state improper

Error: failed to start 2 containers
```

```
❯ podman pod ls
POD ID        NAME        STATUS      CREATED         INFRA ID      # OF CONTAINERS
b63299d6d0a3  pod-myweb   Created     33 seconds ago  41b03be4c846  2

❯ podman container ls -a
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                           COMMAND               CREATED         STATUS      PORTS                   NAMES
41b03be4c846  registry.k8s.io/pause:3.9                             39 seconds ago  Created     0.0.0.0:8080->8080/tcp  b63299d6d0a3-infra
692fffa86b67  quay.io/rhatdan/myimage:latest  /usr/bin/run-http...  35 seconds ago  Created     0.0.0.0:8080->8080/tcp  pod-myweb-myweb
```

```
❯ ll /run/user/1000/containers/cni/dnsname/podman-default-kube-network/
.rw-r--r-- mengz users  99 B Wed Mar  1 05:54:57 2023  addnhosts
.rwx------ mengz users 422 B Wed Mar  1 05:26:50 2023  dnsmasq.conf*
.rwxr-x--- mengz users   0 B Wed Mar  1 05:26:50 2023  lock*
```

But can not start the containers.


### Describe the results you expected

Start the containers normally.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

```
Error: starting container 00b4b7cb2f3d1d92e4340faaefbca6c3266bd8544255d03ca00f7e9e2153d078: plugin type="dnsname" failed (add): cni plugin dnsname failed: dnsname error: dnsmasq failed with "\ndnsmasq: cannot read /run/user/1000/containers/cni/dnsname/podman-default-kube-network/dnsmasq.conf: 权限不够\n": exit status 3
Error: starting container d80363da1aef47eb35e5c0e1818cecb158467e233b65c4aa74555af816f1c50b: a dependency of container d80363da1aef47eb35e5c0e1818cecb158467e233b65c4aa74555af816f1c50b failed to start: container state improper
DEBU[0000] Shutting down engines
```

I recommend you use the netavark network backend as this provides much better dns integration.

In any case I think this might be fixed by https://github.com/containers/dnsname/blob/main/README_PODMAN.md#apparmor

We no longer plan to update dnsname so I close this issue
